findings.title: Drift-rejection test covers a representative subset of validator branches, not every field
findings.detail: The drift test asserts validator rejection for wrong entrypoint, missing S20/synthetic/P01-layout dependencies, boundary booleans, and context/evidence/schema/acceptance-gate/next-subphase drift, but does not separately assert every remaining field branch.
findings.impact: No correctness/security/test gap: the validator anchors all remaining fields to literal expected values with length guards, the RP validator invokes that assertion against the canonical contract, and cross-checks definition/module/fixture surfaces.

security_notes: Metadata/contract declaration only; no executable runtime path, no real data, and no I/O beyond the test reading the synthetic fixture JSON.
Reserved allowed domains example.test and lawfirm-os.invalid plus synthetic-only namespace prefixes avoid real external data exposure.
No-DB/storage/product-state-write, no-runtime-route, no-service-execution, and no-fixture-generation/persistence boundaries are declared and validator-enforced.
test_notes: RP validator failed before evidence creation only on the expected missing CP00-017 evidence files.
raw_review.summary: RP00.P02.M06.S01 is correctly bound as the metadata-only Synthetic Fixture Set service entrypoint contract following RP00.P02.M05.S20. All required boundaries and upstream dependencies are consistently declared and validator-enforced across contract, policy, service module, validator, README, and fixture. Targeted tests and RP validator checks are sufficient for this one-unit Risk A pack. No P0/P1/P2 blockers; one non-blocking P3 test-completeness note. Closeout is gated only on assembling the standard CP00-017 evidence artifacts, including this review.

raw_review_text: Review complete. PASS_WITH_FINDINGS. No blockers: 0 P0/P1/P2, 1 P3 note. CP00-017 / RP00.P02.M06.S01 is internally consistent across contract, policy/module, fixture, test, README, and RP validator; boundaries and upstream dependencies are consistently declared; targeted tests and RP validator checks are sufficient for this one-unit Risk A metadata pack. Closeout is clear after evidence assembly and final validation.
adjudication_notes: Claude returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with no P0, P1, or P2 findings. One P3 finding is deferred in adjudication.md.
